interactions.notes: Email with Aarav Mehta at BharatCart Logistics. Initial outreach around India growth plans, WhatsApp follow-ups, and CRM visibility.
Discussed pilot scope for South and West India sales teams.
Meeting with Rohan Sharma at Jaipur Retail Hub. Discovery covered regional sales teams, GST invoice handoffs, and lead follow-up gaps.
Meeting with Kavya Iyer at Indus Robotics. Contract confirmed; onboarding and customer success handoff are ready.

Product demo with Mumbai sales ops; feedback was positive on WhatsApp reminders.

Sent a concise India retail CRM use case deck after the first intro.

Meeting with Pranav Krishnan at Salem TextileOps. Contract confirmed; onboarding and customer success handoff are ready.
Discovery call covered CRM gaps across Bengaluru and Mumbai account teams.
Shared GST-friendly proposal, onboarding plan, and data migration checklist.
Buying committee asked for revised INR pricing before signature.
Walkthrough covered lead assignment rules for field sales managers.
Sent ROI model using India SMB conversion assumptions.
Champion requested references from similar Indian SaaS customers.
Technical stakeholders raised concerns about SSO and nightly data sync.
Forwarded architecture diagram and API rate-limit details.
Security review is still open with their platform team.
Legal team asked for updated SLA language and India support coverage.
Reviewed redlines with buyer and agreed on two support exceptions.
Final approval depends on liability cap language.
